headline: Broadridge Deploys Agentic AI Across Wealth, Capital Markets
summary: The fintech giant claims its autonomous AI technology, tested across 40-plus clients since 2024, can cut operational costs by up to 30% for new adopters.

raw.headline: Broadridge Deploys Agentic AI Across Wealth, Capital Markets
raw.summary: The fintech giant claims its autonomous AI technology, tested across 40-plus clients since 2024, can cut operational costs by up to 30% for new adopters.

headline: BlockBooster Joins Canton Foundation as Official Member, Standing Alongside DTCC, Euroclear, BNP Paribas, and HSBC
summary: HongKong, May 13, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Alternative asset management firm BlockBooster has officially announced its membership in the Canton Foundation, marking a key step in its strategic path to expand institutional-grade on-chain asset management and deepen collaboration with leading global financial infrastructure. The Canton Foundation is the independent governance body responsible for overseeing the operational mechanisms, technical standards, and validator framework of Canton Network.
